chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.T.A. No.36 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Judge Hearing case For hearing of main case 06.10.2025 Mr. Jamshed Ahmed Abbasi, Advocate for the applicant. ------------------------------- Counsel submits that this transfer application has become infructuous as the parties have settled their dispute amicably out of the Court. Accordingly, this transfer application is dismissed as withdrawn subject to all its legal consequences. J U D G E Asif
